title: rosa canina var. tomentella
intro: Rosa canina var. tomentella, also known as the Downy Dog Rose or Downy Dog Rose Hip, is a variety of the Rosa canina species that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This shrub is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamin C and antioxidants, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. tomentella include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared in various ways, such as making tea, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
